features: Gently cleanses the inside of the cheek
Reduces mouth odour causing bacteria on the tongue
description: Product Description The Colgate 360° activated carbon toothbrush removes plaque, gently cleans the inside of the cheek and reduces bad odour-causing bacteria on the tongue. Ingredients a handle made of 40% recycled plastic and medium-stiff nylon bristles infused with activated charcoa Directions Brush teeth twice a day for two minutes each, brush all surfaces of the teeth, gums and tongue, replace toothbrush every three months. Safety Warning [MIGHT] Safety warning about supervision if young children are present See more
